templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.designtoscano.com/categories/sale

templates.name: Do you price match?
templates.content: We do not typically offer price matching and we advise you to obtain the best price available from wherever you can.

templates.name: Do you price match with Amazon?
templates.content: I'm afraid we do not price-match with Amazon.

templates.name: Can you retroactively apply a code to my order?
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address, and the code you'd like applied?

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and sign up for our affiliate program here: https://www.designtoscano.com/pages/affiliate

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Please contact our Customer Service Team at 1-800-525-5141 immediately if you need to change or cancel your order. Please be advised that some orders are shipped very soon after placement, and it may not always be possible to cancel or change an order.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.designtoscano.com/pages/return-and-exchange

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.designtoscano.com/order_tracks/new

templates.name: Do you offer expedited shipping?
templates.content:
For an additional shipping charge, we can ship most in-stock items overnight or via rush delivery. Please contact us for a ship quote at shipping@designtoscano.com or call us at 1-800-525-5141.
Please note that orders must be quoted and approved by 2:00 p.m. CST to ship that day (subject to credit card approval).

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@designtoscano.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Do you have a catalog?
templates.content: You can request a catalog at the following link: https://www.designtoscano.com/catalog_forms/new/

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via UPS or USPS and once shipped it will take 5-7 business days domestically. Please note that some large, heavy, or bulky items require delivery by truck/motor freight. Those items are marked with the truck icon. All truck/motor freight deliveries are to the first door of the building only. Delivery times are generally scheduled within a 4-hour window and the carrier will contact you directly to schedule an appointment.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We don't currently offer free shipping, but all promos will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Do you offer white glove services?
templates.content: White glove service is available for an additional charge. Our white glove service will bring your new treasure inside, unpack it, and remove packaging materials. Please call customer service at 1-800-525-5141 or email us at customerservice@designtoscano.com for a quote.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customerservice@designtoscano.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.designtoscano.com/categories/sale

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-800-525-5141 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Do you ship to Hawaii/Alaska/the Virgin Islands/Guam, or Puerto Rico?
templates.content: For delivery to Hawaii, Alaska, the Virgin Islands, Guam, or Puerto Rico please call our customer service team toll-free at 1-800-525-5141 or email us at: Shipping@DesignToscano.com for a quote.

templates.name: Back order inquiry
templates.content: If an item(s) is on backorder, an expected due date to our warehouse is shown for the item. If ordering by phone, your Telephone Service Representative will provide that information to you; you will also be notified by mail if your item(s) is backordered for more than 30 days.

templates.name: What is your product/customer satisfaction guarantee?
templates.content: We offer a 60-day product guarantee. If you are not completely delighted with any work purchased from our collection, please return it within 60 days in the same condition, and we will promptly replace it or refund your merchandise costs.
